zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stebbing於大約1503年出生在英國素福爾可凱特萊包時，他的父親John Small Stebbing29歲，母親Alice "Rannelegh" Adams25歲。他和Alice Molly Barker至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1540年在英國英格蘭素福爾可凱特萊包享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stebbing
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Steb, a boll, a trunk, and ing, originating from, meaning offspring of a trunk, a shoot, a branch

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Stebbing was born about 1503, in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England, his father, John Small Stebbing, was 29 and his mother, Alice "Rannelegh" Adams, was 25. He had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with Alice Molly Barker. He died in 1540, in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stebbing est né environ 1503, à Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Small Stebbing, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice "Rannelegh" Adams, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles avec Alice Molly Barker. Il est décédé en 1540, à Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stebbing um 1503 in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Small Stebbing 29 und seine Mutter Alice "Rannelegh" Adams 25. Er hatte mit Alice Molly Barker mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1540 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stebbing è nato il circa 1503 nel Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Small Stebbing, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alice "Rannelegh" Adams, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie con Alice Molly Barker. Morì nel 1540, nel Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Stebbing(이)가 대략 1503년 영국 수폴크 케틀레버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Small Stebbing(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice "Rannelegh" Adams(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Alice Molly Barker(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 케틀레버그에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.
